onboarding.title: Onboarding
onboarding.subtitle: Import active inventory with preview validation, duplicate detection, and reconciliation before go-live.
onboarding.importInstructionsBody: Use the template headers exactly. `payerId` or `payerName` must match one of the configured payer profiles. For Ottawa paramedical pilots, start with the Jane App CSV profile so service discipline, code, and member metadata are preserved.
onboarding.configuredPayersBody: Import rows should match these payer profiles exactly or by payer name.
onboarding.previewResultsBody: Tenio will only commit rows marked Create or Update.
onboarding.templateProfileHelp: Choose the closest source format before preview. Jane App is the recommended Ottawa paramedical profile. The generic template is exact-match. Dentrix is a starter shell with header alias mapping, not a certified parser.
onboarding.profileJaneDescription: Recommended Ottawa paramedical profile with Jane-oriented header aliases and Canadian defaults.
onboarding.profileGenericDescription: Exact header match for the Tenio CSV template.
onboarding.profileDentrixDescription: Starter alias mapping for dental-office exports and sample files.
onboarding.previewGeneratedNotice: Preview generated. Review skipped rows before committing.
onboarding.uploadRequiredError: Upload a CSV file before requesting a preview.
onboarding.previewRequiredError: Preview the file first. Tenio only commits rows marked Create or Update.
onboarding.previewFailedError: The import preview failed. Check the CSV format and try again.
onboarding.commitFailedError: The import commit failed. No backlog changes were applied.

setup.title: Setup Checklist
setup.subtitle: Use this checklist to finish the implementation basics before the team starts working claims in Tenio.
setup.skipLockedMessage: Complete your first import before dismissing this setup guide.
setup.updateError: The onboarding checklist could not be updated. Try again.
setup.welcomeTitle: Finish these four setup steps before go-live
setup.welcomeBody: Tenio will guide you through team access, first import, payer review, and the first queue walkthrough.

team_members.title: Add your team members
team_members.description: Add the people who will work and review claims. For this pilot, initial provisioning is still handled with Tenio support.

first_import.title: Import your first claims
first_import.description: Bring in your active claim inventory so the queue reflects live work before go-live.

configure_payers.title: Configure your payers
configure_payers.description: Confirm payer thresholds and default ownership before the team starts working the queue.

review_first_queue.title: Review your first queue
review_first_queue.description: Open the queue, inspect priorities, and optionally open a claim to see how follow-up works.

priority.title: Start with the priority column
priority.body: Use the priority badges to spot urgent and high-risk claims first.

claim.title: Open a claim from its claim number
claim.body: Click a claim number to open full detail, capture follow-up, and review evidence.

sla.title: Watch the Age / SLA column
sla.body: This column shows aging and breach risk so you can decide what needs attention next.
